message:
feat(demo): implement QueryLab and ExecutionPlan sidebar views

Adds the complete implementations for the two new code explorer view
modes: QueryLab and ExecutionPlan.

render_sidebar_query_lab():
- Query Studio panel with animated SQL query display
- Result Preview panel with tabular query results
- Query Telemetry panel with sparkline visualization
- Feature Spotlight panel reused from source mode
- Uses typewriter effect for animated query demonstration

render_sidebar_exec_plan():
- Execution Plan panel showing query plan tree
- ASCII art plan representation with operators
- IO Telemetry panel with storage metrics
- Index Statistics panel with B-tree stats
- FrankenTUI Spotlight panel for feature highlights
- Demonstrates text-based visualization patterns

Both sidebars feature:
- Four-panel vertical layout with percentage constraints
- Hit area registration for mouse focus
- Panel border styling based on focus state
- Theme-consistent color usage
- Safe bounds checking for small terminal sizes

These implementations complete the multi-mode code explorer demo,
showcasing how to build complex panel-based UIs with FrankenTUI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
